spec.name: The Lane Of The Lying
spec.description: Bodies lie everywhere. Commoner, peasant, duke, duchess. The Gods will not hear you call here. Hence they will not answer you. To the south the path ends at a dark cave entrance. A sign has been posted beside the entrance.

extra_descs.description: A sign beside the dark cave opening reads: WARNING! Only fools and dead people pass this way. The tests of Minos, our glorious ruler, await.
